goal: Add a side-effect-free request-packet builder for memory-cache audit export permit issuance readiness while keeping permit issuance, file writes, durable persistence, external actions, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, write export files, add durable persistence, call external systems, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Memory-cache audit export permit issuance readiness can be converted into a request packet without issuing a permit.
Request and requester refs are required.
File-write and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Actual authority review and permit issuance require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing request ref, and blocked readiness cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, file writes, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-092 classified memory-cache audit export permit issuance readiness without issuing a permit.
